title: hieracium transiens subsp. incomptum
intro: Hieracium transiens subsp. incomptum, also known as the lesser hawkweed, is a type of flowering plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae). It is used in traditional herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and skin problems due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Hieracium transiens subsp. incomptum include relieving digestive issues such as bloating and gas, as well as soothing skin irritations and wounds. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
